svg.title: Soil Life Atlas pipeline — technical DAG (APPLY workflow, v0.1.0-dev)
svg.desc: Per-process DAG for the APPLY workflow. Shows PREPROC subworkflow, FETCH_ATLAS, DECOMPOSE_APPLY subworkflow (SIMPER_MATCH, three correction layers, 4 parallel decompositions, three evaluation modules), and REPORT. ANNOTATE runs as a dimmed parallel branch off the critical path.
svg.text: v0.1.0-dev · POS mode · iter3a_floor020 · primary method fc_weighted_bc
